glosses.ja: 確認する; 点検する

sentences.target: Ich will die Rechnung noch mal überprüfen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl diː ˈʁɛçnʊŋ nɔx maːl ˌyːbɐˈpʁyːfən/

translations.de: Ich will die Rechnung noch mal überprüfen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl diː ˈʁɛçnʊŋ nɔx maːl ˌyːbɐˈpʁyːfən/
translations.en: I want to check the bill again.
translations.es: Quiero revisar la factura otra vez.
translations.fr: Je veux vérifier la facture encore une fois.
translations.ru: Я хочу ещё раз проверить счёт.
translations.pt: Quero conferir a conta de novo.
translations.he: אני רוצה לבדוק את החשבון שוב.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn kiểm tra lại hóa đơn.
translations.ar: أريد أن أراجع الفاتورة مرة أخرى.
translations.nl: Ik wil de rekening nog een keer nakijken.
translations.uk: Я хочу ще раз перевірити рахунок.
translations.hu: Még egyszer át akarom nézni a számlát.
translations.hi: मुझे बिल फिर से जाँचना है.
translations.nb: Jeg vil sjekke regningen en gang til.
translations.id: Saya ingin memeriksa tagihan itu lagi.
translations.ro: Vreau să verific factura din nou.
translations.ja: 請求書をもう一度確認したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing volition; selects the bare infinitive 'überprüfen' at the clause end.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular marking the direct object 'Rechnung'.
Noun; direct object (accusative) referring to the bill to be checked.
Adverb; together with 'mal' forms the set phrase 'noch mal' = 'again/once more', modifying the action.
Adverb (reduced from 'einmal'); with 'noch' expresses repetition ('once more'); adverbial modifier of the verb.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'; inseparable prefix verb meaning 'to verify/check'.

sentences.target: Wir müssen den Vertrag heute überprüfen.

translations.de: Wir müssen den Vertrag heute überprüfen.
translations.en: We have to check the contract today.
translations.es: Tenemos que revisar el contrato hoy.
translations.fr: Nous devons vérifier le contrat aujourd’hui.
translations.yue: 我哋今日要檢查份合約。
translations.pt: Temos que revisar o contrato hoje.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לבדוק את החוזה היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta phải kiểm tra hợp đồng.
translations.nl: We moeten het contract vandaag controleren.
translations.hu: Ma át kell néznünk a szerződést.
translations.hi: हमें आज अनुबंध की जाँच करनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ελέγξουμε το συμβόλαιο σήμερα.
translations.nb: Vi må gå gjennom kontrakten i dag.
translations.id: Kita harus memeriksa kontrak itu hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste gå igenom kontraktet i dag.
translations.da: Vi skal gennemgå kontrakten i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は契約書を確認しないといけません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing necessity/obligation; selects the bare infinitive 'überprüfen'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular marking the direct object 'Vertrag'.
Noun; direct object (accusative) of the checking action.
Temporal adverb specifying that the action is to occur today.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'müssen'.

sentences.target: Der Techniker will die Leitungen überprüfen.

translations.de: Der Techniker will die Leitungen überprüfen.
translations.en: The technician wants to check the cables.
translations.es: El técnico quiere revisar los cables.
translations.fr: Le technicien veut vérifier les câbles.
translations.it: Il tecnico vuole controllare i cavi.
translations.pt: O técnico quer verificar os cabos.
translations.vi: Kỹ thuật viên muốn kiểm tra dây cáp.
translations.nl: De monteur wil de kabels controleren.
translations.hu: A technikus ellenőrizni akarja a kábeleket.
translations.hi: तकनीशियन केबलों की जाँच करना चाहता है.
translations.el: Ο τεχνικός θέλει να ελέγξει τα καλώδια.
translations.ja: 技術者はケーブルを点検したがっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular marking the subject 'Techniker'.
Common noun; subject (nominative) performing the action.
Modal auxiliary expressing intention; selects the bare infinitive 'überprüfen'.
Definite article; accusative plural marking the direct object 'Leitungen'.
Plural noun; direct object (accusative) referring to cables/pipes/lines to be checked.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Ich lasse die Zahlen nochmal überprüfen.

translations.de: Ich lasse die Zahlen nochmal überprüfen.
translations.en: I’m having the numbers checked again.
translations.es: He mandado revisar los números otra vez.
translations.ko: 숫자를 다시 확인해 달라고 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我让人把数字再核对一遍。
translations.yue: 我叫人再核對一次啲數字。
translations.ru: Я попросил проверить цифры ещё раз.
translations.pt: Pedi para conferirem os números de novo.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nhờ người kiểm tra lại các con số.
translations.nl: Ik laat de cijfers nog een keer controleren.
translations.uk: Я прошу ще раз перевірити цифри.
translations.hi: मैंने संख्याओं की फिर से जाँच कराने के लिए कहा है.
translations.nb: Jeg får tallene kontrollert på nytt.
translations.ro: Las să se verifice din nou cifrele.
translations.ja: 数字をもう一度確認してもらっています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Causative auxiliary ('to have/let'); selects a bare infinitive and indicates causing someone to perform the action.
Definite article; accusative plural marking the direct object 'Zahlen' that undergoes the checking.
Plural noun; accusative object affected by the causative construction with 'lassen'.
Adverb meaning 'again/once more'; modifies the verbal action.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the causative auxiliary 'lasse'.
